title: TCMS (Teacher College Management System)
description: Comprehensive management suite for admissions, academic records, and student lifecycle operations.
achievements: Standardized data structures across departments for reliable analytics
Improved student service turnaround through integrated workflows
preview: Process automation architecture for end-to-end academic operations.

title: FDC-MIS
description: Management information system for planning, monitoring, and evaluating facility-level development programs.
achievements: Established KPI-based monitoring modules aligned with institutional goals
Enabled multi-site reporting consolidation for executive decision support
preview: Multi-site insight system for strategic planning and KPI tracking.

title: Contract Management System (CoMIS)
description: End-to-end contract lifecycle platform from initiation to compliance tracking and renewal governance.
achievements: Reduced compliance delays with automated reminders and escalation workflows
Implemented auditable approval trails for procurement transparency
preview: Secure contract orchestration with audit-ready approval trails.
